news.t: AI's most explosive hardware trades are hitting a wall. Why optical and memory stocks are falling.
Options Now Available on FOTO, Tuttle Capital's Pure Play Photonics ETF
AI ETFs: The Next Wave Emerges
From Compute, to Memory, to Light: Tuttle Capital Launches the Pure Play Photonics ETF (FOTO)

holdings.infoBox: FOTO is an equity ETF with a total of 15 individual holdings. The top holdings are Clear Street Pledged stock at 16.83%, IPG Photonics at 12.17%, Lumentum Holdings at 11.65%, Coherent at 9.55%, and Fabrinet at 9.07%.

overview.description: The Tuttle Capital Pure Play Photonics ETF (FOTO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed, investing in firms whose primary business operations are directly related to photonics. The fund focuses on businesses involved in technologies that generate, transmit, detect, and apply light across communications, sensing, imaging, manufacturing, and semiconductor applications. FOTO was launched on May 29, 2026 and is issued by Tuttle Capital.

data.title: AI's most explosive hardware trades are hitting a wall. Why optical and memory stocks are falling.
data.text: Optical stocks have emerged as a bountiful play on the artificial-intelligence trade, but Friday's selloff is putting a damper on that momentum.
